description:
Automatic Windows HDR Switching For Any Application.

PyAutoActions automates HDR management for your games and applications, enabling and disabling HDR based on the process status.
Changes:
- Added event filter to clear list widget focus and selection when clicking empty space.
- Added ui text to ini file for easy translation. Requested by @Rockstar94FS
- Added manual pause toggle for hdr/sdr switching. Very Buggy race condition might exist at start.
- Updated libraries.
- Updated Python to v3.14.4
- Extra Exception fixes.
